title: Fintech
summary: Fintech AI engineers ship systems for payments, risk, credit, compliance review, and document-heavy operations. The work needs evals, audit trails, latency controls, and model choices that stand up to regulators and finance teams.

title: Healthtech
summary: Healthtech AI engineers build clinical-adjacent workflows for intake, coding, summarisation, prior authorisation, and patient operations. The work needs privacy-aware data handling, human review, and evals that catch unsafe output before release.

title: SaaS
summary: SaaS AI engineers turn product usage, support tickets, docs, and account data into model-backed workflows customers can use inside the product. The work needs clean integration, evals, permission boundaries, and cost control per tenant.

title: Govtech
summary: Govtech AI engineers work on case management, citizen service, policy search, document workflows, and legacy system integration. The work needs accessible UX, human review, procurement-safe architecture, and audit trails for public-sector teams.
